description: The 'Ndrina Cracolici is a Calabrian 'ndrina based in Maierato, Maida, and Filogaso in the Vibo Valentia province, with branches in Novara and Milan. It is involved in mafia association, murder, extortion, drug trafficking, and illegal arms possession. The group has been in conflict with the Bonavota clan for control of Sant'Onofrio, and was targeted in operations Conquista (2017) and Artemis (2024).
